CustomField.description: Copies from Eligibility Income Calculation (hidden) at the time of income certification. Includes calculations from all related Income Sources where "Do Not Include..." is not checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Copies from Eligibility Income Calculation (hidden) at the time of income certification. Includes calculations from all related Income Sources where "Do Not Include..." is not checked.
CustomField.label: Certified Eligibility Income Calculation
